introSection: Snoopy's Soap Box Racers is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Kings Island in Mason, Ohio, USA. It is a Family Boomerang installation from Vekoma.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Vertical construction began in February 2024. The coaster opened on May 24, 2024.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Snoopy's Soap Box Racers was built as part of Kings Island's new-for-2024 Camp Snoopy area. It has tan track with brown supports.

fullText:
Snoopy's Soap Box Racers is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Kings Island in Mason, Ohio, USA. It is a Family Boomerang installation from Vekoma.

Vertical construction began in February 2024. The coaster opened on May 24, 2024.

Snoopy's Soap Box Racers was built as part of Kings Island's new-for-2024 Camp Snoopy area. It has tan track with brown supports.
